name: GZ6G Technologies Corp.
summary: GZ6G Technologies Corp. provides enterprise smart technology and consulting solutions. The company offers wireless IT networking hardware, software solutions, IT managed services, and IT technical support; security, data management, and cloud computing solutions, as well as co-location and hosting services; smart solution software applications, and third party hardware and software integrations; software and web development; marketing, advertising, and sponsorship data analytics agency; and direct marketing SaaS platforms. Its customers include federal government, stadiums, airports, universities, and the entertainment industry. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered Las Vegas, Nevada.
